title: Extract proposal artifact detail panel from review workspace
summary: Modularize the macOS review/navigation workspace by extracting the proposal selected-artifact detail panel into a dedicated native support file.
acceptance_criteria: StudioMacProposalArtifactDetailPanel moves out of StudioMacReviewNavigationWorkspace.swift into its own macOS source file.
The extracted panel preserves selected artifact summaries, focus actions, apply-preview sections, and repo-audit truth.
The main review workspace file becomes meaningfully smaller and proposal detail ownership becomes clearer.
Ticket validation, patch hygiene, repo contract validation, and a targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build pass for the slice.

evidence.note: The selected-artifact detail surface now lives in `StudioMacReviewNavigationProposalArtifactDetail.swift` instead of staying embedded in the main review workspace file.

The extraction preserved selected artifact summaries, focus and inspect actions, apply-preview readiness sections, diff planning, and repo-audit truth while further shrinking `StudioMacReviewNavigationWorkspace.swift`.
Confirmed patch hygiene and whitespace correctness.
Repo contract still passes after the proposal detail extraction.

evidence.path: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
evidence.note: Targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build succeeded after the extraction.

trigger.source_ref: Top 10 item 1 after HS-0031: extract StudioMacProposalArtifactDetailPanel into its own support file.

commands: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
agent_notes: Keep the slice focused on the selected-artifact detail surface rather than broader proposal workflow changes.
Reuse the already extracted proposal workspace and proposal support helpers instead of re-merging responsibilities.
